source.name: Study in Austria — Visa & residence permit

extraSources.name: OeAD — Residence permit (student, no mobility programme)

requirements.label: University admission
requirements.detail: Admission (or confirmation of a place) at an Austrian higher-education institution.

requirements.label: Proof of funds
requirements.detail: Prove monthly means for 12 months: about €1,308.39/month if you are 24 or older, or €722.58/month if under 24 (2026 levels).

requirements.label: Health insurance
requirements.detail: Health insurance valid in Austria covering all risks.

requirements.label: Language proof
requirements.detail: German for German-taught programmes, or IELTS/TOEFL for English-taught.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for the residence-permit period.

requirements.label: Proof of accommodation
requirements.detail: Evidence of accommodation in Austria (e.g. tenancy agreement) is required.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you an Austrian number and data on landing.
